Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0669 "JACKTHENIPPERII-07E3-0669" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07e3 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Jack the Nipper II.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07E3 to set $D1 to zero before start, as otherwise the games crashes (maybe an attempt at an obfuscated protection?) As the original did not have a loading screen, the one included was converted from the Amstrad CPC version by DATA-LAND of Technische Maschinenfabrik (https://csdb.dk/scener/?id=4845).
